items.name: SMART-HANDBAG-SAFETY-SYSTEM
items.description: Smart Handbag Safety System is an IoT-based security solution that monitors unauthorized access and protects personal belongings using sensors and real-time alerts. The system detects suspicious activity and notifies the user through buzzer alerts and mobile notifications for enhanced safety and convenience.
